1.title: Communication Buffer - Size
1.query:
timeseries size = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.communication_buffer.size)
| sort arrayAvg(size) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Communication Buffer - Used
2.query:
timeseries used = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.communication_buffer.used)
| sort arrayAvg(used) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Config - Status
3.query:
timeseries status = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.config.status)
| sort arrayAvg(status) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Event Ingest - Data Sent
4.query:
timeseries data_sent = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.event_ingest.data_sent),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(data_sent) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Event Ingest - Events Rejected
5.query:
timeseries events_rejected = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.event_ingest.events_rejected),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(events_rejected) desc
| limit 20

6.title: Event Ingest - Events Sent

timeseries events_sent = avg(dt.sfm.extension.engine.event_ingest.events_sent),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
